case_title: CHUI YUNG WONG VS. EVANS TAUSHA NICHOLE et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, CHUI YUNG SERVED JAN-22-2008, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-5

ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF JURY FEE AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 (CRC 3.62) AS TO DEFENDANT SERRANO, NATHAN

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT NATHAN SERRANO'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. NATHAN SERRANO HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: D.LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)
FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF NATHAN SERRANO ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, CHUI YUNG AS TO DEFENDANT NICHOLE, EVANS TAUSHA DOES 1-5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
